title: GUI registration under Design Laws in India: Calcutta High Court settles the debate
description: Nearly three years ago, we wrote about the “hope” for GUI (graphical user interfaces) registration under Indian design laws, drawing upon the then-nascent jurisprudence emerging from the Calcutta High Court in UST Global (Singapore) Pte. Ltd. vs. The Controller of Patents and Designs. In this judgment, Calcutta High Court had remanded the matter back to Controller for fresh consideration, and the question of GUI registrability remained legally unsettled.In a recent case, on March 9, 2026, Justic
